nasb.text: And Jehu drew his bow with his full strength and shot Joram between his arms; and the arrow went through his heart and he sank in his chariot.

esv.text: And Jehu drew his bow with his full strength, and shot Joram between the shoulders, so that the arrow pierced his heart, and he sank in his chariot.

cnv.text: 耶戶拉滿弓，射中約蘭的背；箭從他的心窩穿出，他就倒在自己的車上。

ccb.text: 耶户张弓搭箭，射中约兰的后背，箭穿透他的心脏，他倒毙在车上。
